steps.title: Identify Price's finding
steps.content: Price found that the social features of streaming platforms made users more aware of how their listening might be perceived, and that this awareness affected how they managed their listening.

steps.title: Match perceived-audience behavior
steps.content: Choice B concerns algorithmic repetition, choice C concerns shared listening, and choice D concerns passive consumption. The quote about choosing songs friends might like instead of personal preferences directly shows perceived audience shaping listening choices. The answer is A.
